title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 529.090 - Recovery a bar to further suit
text:
529.090.  Recovery a bar to further suit. — If any damages shall be recovered, by virtue of this chapter, against any person making return to such writ, he shall not be liable to be sued in any other action or suit for making such return.
(RSMo 1939 § 1704) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1540; 1919 § 1990; 1909 § 2554
